title: Kuro Materials
body:
Kuro Materials mod

Unique materials with useful features This mod adds: - Zurite => A material with some Netherite properties, including fire and knockback resistance. While it is less durable, it is cheaper to craft and has the autorepairing feature - Traveler's Relic, Fragment => A relic that can save the player’s position (Crouch + right-click to set location) and teleport back to that location (Hold right-click to teleport). It can be split into three fragments, which work similarly but can only link to an Anchor Stone or Lodestone - Link Relic => Is created by combining two Traveler's Relic Fragments. Can be linked to a player (right-click to link), allowing teleportation directly to that player (Hold right-click to teleport) - Anchor Stone => Serves as a link point for Traveler's Relic Fabric/Quilt dependencies: - Mod Menu mod (Optional)
Spoiler
